task_description: Book a flight-and-hotel package for Hong Kong with family-oriented traveler settings and proceed to reserve a selected hotel offer.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a rounded dark-blue navigation tab labeled "Flight + Hotel" with a white icon of an airplane and small suitcase, and a semitransparent red X centered directly on that tab. In the full-screen view, this is in the top blue navigation bar of the Booking.com page, alongside tabs such as Stays, Flights, Car Rentals, Attractions, and Airport taxis, above a flight search form.
caption.action: Click the "Flight + Hotel" tab in the top navigation bar.
caption.expectation: The tab should become selected and the page should switch to or refresh into the flight-and-hotel bundle search mode.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a rounded white-outlined language selector button in the page header with blue Chinese text beginning with "出" and a semitransparent red X centered on this button. A small Google Translate popup is overlapping the same area, showing language tabs such as Traditional Chinese and Simplified Chinese. In the full-screen view, this is a UI control in the top-right area of the Booking.com co-branded Agoda page, above a large banner image and footer links, with the translate popup anchored near the header.
caption.action: Click the language selector button in the top-right header underneath the red X.
caption.expectation: The language control should become selected, likely opening or focusing a language menu or changing the current language-related UI state.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the left side of a large white search input box with gray placeholder text in Chinese reading "输入城市/区域/酒店名字" and a semitransparent red X centered over the text area inside that field. In the full-screen view, this search box is the first field in a wide booking search bar centered over a mountain-and-camping background image on an Agoda/Booking.com page, followed by date selectors, a guest/room selector, and a blue search button.
caption.action: Click inside the city/area/hotel name search field under the red X.
caption.expectation: The search input field should become active, placing a text cursor in the box and readying it for typing a destination or hotel name.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The text entry area is a large white destination search field with a magnifying-glass icon on the left, and the text "hongkon" is already visible inside it with the insertion cursor at the end, indicating the destination name is being typed into this field rather than selected from the list below. Beneath the field, an autocomplete dropdown is open showing destination suggestions in Chinese, including entries such as Singapore, Guangzhou, Shanghai, Bangkok, and Macau, each with hotel counts on the right; the Bangkok row is highlighted in blue. In the full-screen view, this search field is the first box in a wide hotel search bar centered over a dark mountain-and-grass background on an Agoda/Booking.com page, followed by check-in and check-out date boxes, a guest/room selector, and a blue search button.
caption.action: Type "HONGKONG" into the active destination search field, appending to the existing text in the box.
caption.expectation: The text in the destination field should update to include the typed destination name, and the suggestion list below should refresh to show matching places related to Hong Kong.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a blue-highlighted autocomplete suggestion row in the destination dropdown, with white Chinese text reading "香港, 中國香港" and a small rounded light badge labeled "熱門之選" beside it. The semitransparent red X is centered on this highlighted row, indicating that exact suggestion is the target. In the full-screen view, this dropdown is open beneath the destination field of the Agoda/Booking.com hotel search bar; the search box currently contains "hongkong," and the highlighted row appears among other location suggestions below it.
caption.action: Click the highlighted destination suggestion row labeled "香港, 中國香港" under the red X.
caption.expectation: That destination suggestion should be selected, the dropdown should close or update, and the destination field should populate with the chosen Hong Kong location.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a calendar date cell labeled "11" in the April 2026 date picker, with a semitransparent red X centered directly on that circular date button. Nearby dates 9 and 10 are already filled in blue, indicating the current selected range extends through those days. In the full-screen view, the Agoda booking search bar is open over a dark camping background, and the date picker panel is expanded beneath the check-in/check-out fields, showing April 2026 and May 2026 side by side.
caption.action: Click the date cell labeled "11" under the red X in the calendar.
caption.expectation: The clicked date should become selected as part of the booking date range, updating the highlighted dates and possibly completing or advancing the stay-date selection.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a circular date button labeled "13" in the April 2026 calendar, with a semitransparent red X centered directly on that date cell. The date sits just below the already blue-highlighted range that includes 11 and 12, making this a calendar day control rather than a blank area. In the full-screen view, a booking search panel is open on an Agoda page over a camping background, with the destination set to Hong Kong and the date picker expanded for April 2026 and May 2026 side by side.
caption.action: Click the calendar date cell labeled "13" under the red X.
caption.expectation: The date cell should become selected, extending or updating the highlighted stay-date range in the calendar.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a dropdown menu item labeled "一家去玩" with a right-pointing chevron on its right edge, and a semitransparent red X centered directly on that row. This is a UI control within the traveler/room selection menu, not a blank area. In the full-screen view, the Agoda search form is visible over a dark camping background, with destination set to Hong Kong, dates filled, the guest selector showing "2 位成人 1 客房," and the guest-type dropdown expanded beneath it listing options including "獨遊旅客," "二人同行," "一家去玩," "團體出遊," and "商務旅客."
caption.action: Click the dropdown row labeled "一家去玩" under the red X.
caption.expectation: That traveler-category row should be selected, likely opening its submenu or updating the guest-selection options for family travel.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the right-side guest-count panel in the traveler selector, with rows for rooms, adults, and children. The semitransparent red X is centered directly on the blue minus button in the row labeled "2 成人," indicating the decrement control for the adult count. In the full-screen view, Chrome is on an Agoda page with a dark outdoor camping background, the destination field shows Hong Kong, date fields are filled for April 2026, the traveler/category popover is open, and the family-travel option is selected on the left while the quantity controls are shown on the right.
caption.action: Click the blue minus button in the "2 成人" row under the red X.
caption.expectation: The adult count should decrease by one, updating the row from 2 adults to 1 adult and refreshing the guest summary accordingly.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a large blue rectangular button with white Chinese text reading "搜出好價," and the semitransparent red X is centered directly on this button, indicating a clickable UI control. In the full-screen view, Google Chrome is displaying an Agoda page with a dark outdoor camping background, the destination field contains Hong Kong, the dates are set in April 2026, and the traveler selection popover is still open showing the family-travel configuration with 1 room, 3 adults, and 0 children.
caption.action: Click the blue "搜出好價" search button under the red X.
caption.expectation: The traveler popover should close and Agoda should begin the search, loading or refreshing the results for the selected destination, dates, and guest settings.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the price panel on a hotel result card. A black tooltip above says in Chinese that it is time to book and the price has risen by 21%. Beneath it is a small pale pink badge with an upward-trending chart icon and the text "價格已上調," and the semitransparent red X is centered directly on this badge, indicating a clickable element on the listing card. In the full-screen view, Google Chrome is displaying Agoda search results for Hong Kong with dates in April 2026 and 3 adults, 1 room. The results list is visible in the center, filters are on the left, and the highlighted hotel card is the Ibis Hong Kong Central & Sheung Wan Hotel with its image, title, rating, and price shown.
caption.action: Click the pale pink "價格已上調" badge with the upward-trending chart icon under the red X.
caption.expectation: The badge should register the click, likely selecting the hotel result or opening more pricing details related to the price increase for that listing.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a blue rounded rectangular button labeled "查看優惠" in white Chinese text, with the semitransparent red X centered directly on it. This is a clickable UI control in the page content area next to the red price text "HKD 1,940." In the full-screen view, Chrome is on the Agoda hotel details page for "宜必思香港中上環 (Ibis Hong Kong Central & Sheung Wan Hotel)," with a photo gallery across the top, navigation tabs below, the hotel title and rating information in the main section, and the same price-and-button area on the right side under the photos.
caption.action: Click the blue "查看優惠" button under the red X.
caption.expectation: The button should register the click and Agoda should open or scroll to the available room offers and pricing options for this hotel.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a blue rounded rectangular button labeled "預訂" with a semitransparent red X centered directly on it. Just above it is a white room-selection dropdown labeled "客房x1" with a down arrow, and below the button is gray text indicating no prepayment is needed now. This is a clickable UI control in the booking panel. In the full-screen view, Chrome is on Agoda's room selection section for the Ibis Hong Kong Central & Sheung Wan Hotel. The page lists room options; the highlighted card is for "Studio, 1 Queen Bed, City View," with room details on the left, the price "HK$ 1,940" in red on the right, and the same booking panel containing the blue "預訂" button.
caption.action: Click the blue "預訂" button under the red X.
caption.expectation: The selected room offer should be chosen, and Agoda should proceed to the next booking step or open the reservation details for this room.
